raw_article.title: Apple cuts guidance after weaker iPhone demand in China
raw_article.description: Apple lowered its revenue outlook and warned of softer near-term demand.
raw_article.snippet: The company cut guidance and analysts flagged weaker sales momentum.

raw_article.title: Microsoft beats earnings estimates and raises outlook for cloud growth

raw_article.snippet: Azure growth remained strong and management raised outlook.

raw_article.snippet: The central bank remains focused on inflation.

raw_article.title: Nvidia to acquire startup in AI infrastructure deal

raw_article.title: JPMorgan faces lawsuit over compliance controls
